prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic wide shot of a futuristic military command compound in a desert canyon at golden hour. The scene shows a massive concrete-and-steel tactical base stretching diagonally from center-left to upper-right, with angular brutalist architecture, weathered tan concrete, dark metal trim, industrial vents, armored doors, railings, antenna masts, floodlights, and a tall control tower near the upper center. Add exactly 4 prominent text markings on the facility: a black sign reading DELTA FORCE with smaller text "TACTICAL COMMAND CENTER" beneath it, a large blue wall panel labeled A2 with small "SECTOR" text below, a large orange door number 12, and a small triangular warning-style emblem on the control tower. In the foreground, place one large concrete road barrier spanning the lower frame, painted with diagonal black-and-yellow hazard stripes and showing grime, chips, and two metal lifting loops. Behind it, include an empty paved road curving along the base, low security fencing, bollards, stacked crates, and industrial yard details. The background has rocky desert cliffs on the left, a few sparse palm trees, and a warm orange sunset sky with the sun low near the left horizon and soft clouds. Use a slightly tilted dynamic camera angle, 16:9 aspect ratio, low-to-mid viewpoint, high-detail game cinematic realism, dramatic warm rim light, long shadows, crisp textures, realistic dust and weathering, no people, no vehicles, no watermark.
